zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cutler I於1523年6月16日出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親Thomas Cutler11520歲，母親Julianne32歲。他於1546年與Parnell Barker在英國素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1596年5月9日在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其易普斯維其 聖 尼古拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Cutler I于1523年6月16日出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲Thomas Cutler11520岁，母亲Julianne32岁。他于1546年与Parnell Barker在英国素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1596年5月9日在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其易普斯維其 聖 尼古拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cutler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of knives, from Middle English cutele, cutteler, coteler ‘cutler; maker, repairer, or seller of knives, etc.’ (Anglo-French cuteler, Old French coutelier, cotelier). Compare Nesmith and Cottle .
Americanized form of German Kottler or Kattler, which is of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Nesmith
meanings: English and Scottish (Glasgow): occupational name for a maker of knives, from Middle English knif-smith ‘knife-smith, cutler’ (Old English cnīf + smith).
English: alternatively, an occupational name connected with wheel making, from Middle English nave-smith ‘nave-smith’ (Old English nafu, nafa ‘nave, the central part of a wheel’ + smith).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cutler I was born on 16 June 1523, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Cutler, was 11520 and his mother, Julianne, was 32. He married Parnell Barker in 1546, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 9 May 1596, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Ipswich St Nicholas, Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cutler I est né le 16 juin 1523, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Cutler, avait 11520 ans et sa mère, Julianne, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Parnell Barker en 1546, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1596, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich St Nicholas, Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Parnell Barker nel 1546, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cutler Iが1523年6月16日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Thomas Cutlerは11520歳，母Julianneは32歳であった。1546年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでParnell Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1596年5月9日にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチイプスウィチ スト ニチオラスにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Nicholas, Ipswich, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치 이프스위치 스트 닉홀아스
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cutler I(이)가 1523년 6월 16일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cutler(은)는 11520세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianne(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1546년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Parnell Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1596년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치 이프스위치 스트 닉홀아스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cutler I nasceu em 16 de junho de 1523, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Cutler, tinha 11520 anos e sua mãe, Julianne, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Parnell Barker em 1546, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1596, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich St Nicholas, Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Nicholas, Ipswich, Suffolk, England: ипсвич ст ничолас, ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cutler I родился 16 июня 1523 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Cutler было 11520 лет, а матери, которую звали Julianne, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Parnell Barker в 1546 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 9 мая 1596 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич ст ничолас, ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Cutler I nació el 16 de junio de 1523, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Cutler, tenía 11520 años y su mamá, Julianne, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Parnell Barker en 1546, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1596, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich St Nicholas, Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
